## Task Description
Run the CSS through the W3C validator and save a screenshot of the results into the repo.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CSS validated at https://jigsaw.w3.org/css-validator/
- [ ] Screenshot saved into the repo
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request
